headline: Assessing GE Vernova (GEV) Valuation After A Powerful Year Of Share Price Gains
summary: Recent performance snapshot for GE Vernova GE Vernova (GEV) has drawn investor attention after a strong year to date, with the stock up 39.9% and the past year’s total return at 96.4%. The company also reported revenue of US$39.4b and net income of US$9.4b. See our latest analysis for GE Vernova. While the recent 7 day and 30 day share price returns are down 8.5% and 10.6% respectively, the year to date share price return of 39.9% and 1 year total shareholder return of 96.4% still point to...
